name: io.github.dengxuhui/igpsport-mcp
title: iGPSport MCP
description: Local MCP server exposing iGPSport cycling data to LLM clients. Derived training metrics (NP/IF/TSS/CTL/ATL/TSB) are computed server-side, plus workout generation and push to head unit.

environment_variables.name: IGPSPORT_USERNAME
environment_variables.description: iGPSport account (phone number for CN / email for international)

environment_variables.name: IGPSPORT_LTHR
environment_variables.description: Lactate Threshold Heart Rate in bpm
